steps: Go to https://developer-dashboard.whoop.com/ and sign in with your WHOOP account credentials
If prompted, authenticate via https://id.whoop.com using your WHOOP account
Create a Team if you have not done so yet
Click 'Create App' to register a new OAuth application
Enter your application name, description, and redirect URI
After creation, copy your Client ID and Client Secret from the app details page
Use the authorization URL https://api.prod.whoop.com/oauth/oauth2/auth to start the OAuth flow
Exchange the authorization code for an access token at https://api.prod.whoop.com/oauth/oauth2/token

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your WHOOP OAuth application Client ID

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your WHOOP OAuth application Client Secret

notes: WHOOP device required — the API provides data only for users who own a WHOOP band
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE is required
Available scopes: read:profile, read:recovery, read:cycles, read:sleep, read:workout, read:body_measurement
Access tokens expire and must be refreshed using the refresh token
